extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper took his second stage sprint victory while POGACAR Tadej salvaged GC with late bike change after puncture inside 5km to go.
tactical_patterns: POGACAR grabbed intermediate sprint bonus seconds despite 4-second GC lead, doubling his margin preemptively against crosswind splits.
GANNA Filippo chased breakaways all day after mountain stage, showing UAE exploits INEOS domestique depth for controlling transition stages.
Late-race puncture for race leader POGACAR demonstrated peloton already racing mode at 4.5km, making mechanical timing critical on flat stages.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: Won intermediate sprints AND stage sprint, plus finished 10th in time trial, showing unusual diesel engine range beyond pure sprinting.
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: Animated chasing work day after climbing Jebel Jais reveals he carries form exceptionally fresh between mountain and flat efforts.
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Contested intermediate sprint for bonus seconds despite tiny 2-second GC lead, signaling aggressive margin management over conservative riding.
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Mechanical disengagement suggests lingering impact from Jebel Jais crash, unlike normal recovery pattern for stage sprinters.
rider_signals.STRYKOV Dmitri: neutral: Dominated intermediate sprint competition (41 points vs 14 for nearest rival) through systematic breakaway placement rather than pure speed.
